title: pulicaria viscosa
intro: Pulicaria viscosa, also known as sticky fleabane or sticky poultice plant, is a perennial herb in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Pulicaria viscosa include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to utilize its medicinal properties.
